title: Crystal Sphere
description:
[sine][blue]"I predicted you'd enter...!"[/blue][/sine]

A [jitter]raspy[/jitter] voice calls out as you enter a [purple]mystic hut[/purple].

[sine][blue]"Your destiny has brought you here. We must uncover your future and fortunes so you can SAVE US ALL!!"[/blue][/sine]
"Okay, here are the options for the [gold]Crystal Sphere reading[/gold]. Be sure to sign this waiver as well," she says while bringing out pen and parchment.
conditions: All players must have at least 100 Gold
notes: This is a minigame event featuring the Crystal Sphere. The player chooses between two strategies: paying Gold or gaining a [red]Debt[/red] curse to access divinations. The [gold]Uncover Future[/gold] option costs a variable amount of Gold (base 50 plus 1-49 additional, totaling 51-99 Gold total), while the [gold]Payment Plan[/gold] option costs a [red]Debt[/red] curse instead. The Payment Plan grants more divinations (6 vs 3). The divination minigame itself involves revealing tiles within the Crystal Sphere to obtain various rewards. The event has distinctive flavor text with animated text effects like [sine], [jitter], and [rainbow] tags.
